Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for default prove-up hearing. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Yvonne Lee. Plaintiff represented by and through his counsel, John H, Wunsch presents evidence. Mark Hoffman was sworn and examined. The court entered default against Alphabit Media and Steven Karehman. Good cause appearing, the court signs judgment for plaintiff as follows: Principal: $224,475.63; Interest: $9,077.97; Attorney Fees: $1,350.00; Costs: $380.76 for a total sum of $235,284.36. Judgment signed in open court.
